name: reviewer_after_coder_v1
description: After coder completes significant changes, supervisor should spawn reviewer

messages.content: PLACEHOLDER — will be overridden by current supervisor prompt
Добавь HTTP health check endpoint с поддержкой readiness и liveness probes. Endpoint должен возвращать JSON с полями status, uptime, version. Нужны unit тесты.
messages.content_preview: Добавь HTTP health check endpoint с поддержкой readiness и liveness probes...

tool_calls.name: manage_tasks
tool_calls.arguments:
{"action": "create", "title": "Add HTTP health check endpoint", "description": "Type: User Story
Goal: Add HTTP health check endpoint with readiness and liveness probes.
Context: Server currently only has gRPC (internal/delivery/grpc/server.go). Need separate HTTP listener for health probes. Follow net/http pattern.
Acceptance Criteria:
  - GET /healthz returns {"status":"ok","uptime":"...","version":"..."}
  - GET /readyz returns readiness status
  - GET /livez returns liveness status
  - Unit tests cover all endpoints
Constraints: Don't modify gRPC server. Add HTTP alongside it.", "acceptance_criteria": ["GET /healthz returns JSON with status, uptime, version", "GET /readyz returns readiness status", "GET /livez returns liveness status", "Unit tests pass"]}

messages.content: Task task_hc_001 created and approved by user. You can now start it and create subtasks.
messages.content_preview: Task task_hc_001 created and approved by user...

tool_calls.name: manage_subtasks
tool_calls.arguments:
{"action": "create", "task_id": "task_hc_001", "title": "Implement health check HTTP handler and tests", "description": "What: Create HealthHandler struct with methods HandleHealth (GET /healthz), HandleReady (GET /readyz), HandleLive (GET /livez). Each returns JSON response with appropriate fields. HandleHealth includes status, uptime (time.Since(startTime)), and version (from build ldflags or constant).
Where: Create internal/delivery/http/health_handler.go and internal/delivery/http/health_handler_test.go. Modify cmd/server/main.go to start HTTP server on port 60402.
How: Use net/http stdlib. Follow Clean Architecture patterns from existing grpc/server.go. Use slog for logging.
Acceptance: go build ./... compiles. go test ./internal/delivery/http/... passes. curl localhost:60402/healthz returns valid JSON.", "files_involved": ["cmd/server/main.go", "internal/delivery/grpc/server.go"]}

messages.content: Subtask sub_hc_001 created for task task_hc_001. Status: ready.

[SUCCESS] Agent: code-agent-hc-abc123, Status: completed, Result: Created internal/delivery/http/health_handler.go with HealthHandler struct implementing HandleHealth, HandleReady, HandleLive endpoints. Created internal/delivery/http/health_handler_test.go with 6 unit tests covering all endpoints, JSON response format, and error cases. Modified cmd/server/main.go to start HTTP server on :60402 alongside gRPC. All tests pass: go test ./internal/delivery/http/... (6 passed, 0 failed).
Код-агент завершил работу. Созданы health check endpoints с тестами. Необходимо проверить качество кода и убедиться что реализация соответствует требованиям.
messages.content_preview: Код-агент завершил работу. Созданы health check endpoints с тестами...
